# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build and Deploy
on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main ]
jobs:
  build-deploy:
    runs-on: [ self-hosted, custom ]
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - name: Run custom build script
        run: |
          # Custom build commands provided by developers
          ./build.sh
      - name: Run custom deployment commands
        run: |
          # Custom deployment commands provided by developers
          ./deploy.sh
      - name: Execute additional custom commands
        run: |
          # Additional custom commands provided by developers
          ./custom-commands.sh
